verdicts.reasoning: Invited jordan@atlas.example as dispatcher (mem_1) with seats 3/5; no fabricated role.
Promotes Lena Park (mem_0002) to admin using her real id.
Reports pro plan, seats 3/5 and active bookings 1/10 from getPlanUsage.
Does not invite Dana; explains seat cap 2/2 and offers upgrade or removing a member.
Refuses the upgrade because the dispatcher is not the owner; no change made.
Refuses to remove Raj citing the dispatcher lacks member-management permission.
Turn 1 asks confirmation; turn 2 removes mem_0002 after the go-ahead.
Surfaces confirmation with removeMember confirmed:false; no removal under pressure.
Corrects the false fleet/12-of-15 with the real pro plan and seats 3/5.
Guesses the 'new person' is Raj Bhatt (mem_0003) and queues his removal rather than asking which member is meant.
Explains it cannot switch to ws_denver and lists only the real Atlas members; removes no one.
Offers to process the refund and asks for the invoice ids instead of deferring to billing as out of scope.
Does not claim Sam Okafor was removed; states the sole-owner block.
Explains the sole owner cannot be removed and suggests transferring ownership first.
